column1: # PJM RPM capacity prices: BRA Resource Clearing Prices + Final Zonal Capacity Prices

#   - "<DY> Final Zonal UCAP Obligations
column2: Capacity Prices and CTR Credit Rates" (XLS;

column1: #     for DY 2023/24+ the FZSF-FZCP sheet ships inside the "<DY> 3IA Results" XLSX)
#     -> final_zonal_capacity_price_per_mw_day (one value per zone)
#   - "<DY> Base Residual Auction Results" report (XLS/PDF)
#     -> bra_price_per_mw_day (one value per LDA; copy down to each member zone)
# Zones are canonical labels (see data/pjm/README.md crosswalk). UGI is not
# separately reported in the RPM zonal files (inside the PPL LDA); OVEC is
# excluded (no retail LSE load; reported only from DY 2022/23).
# MAINTENANCE: To add a new delivery year:
# 1. Download both files for the DY from the RPM page (URLs change per DY;
#    record the Final Zonal XLS URL in source_url).
# 2. Add one row per transmission zone (canonical labels; see data/pjm/README.md
#    crosswalk). Set lda to the most-specific LDA that cleared separately for
#    that zone; zones at the system price get lda=RTO.
# 3. Set final_price_as_of to the XLS publication/revision date.
# 4. Run: just validate. 5. Commit. 6. just upload.
# MAINTENANCE: IA true-ups — when an Incremental Auction changes a DY's Final
# Zonal Capacity Price
column2: update the affected rows in place

column1: # final_price_as_of
column2: note the IA in notes. Git history is the revision trail.
